title: Nandri Solla Unakku Song Lyrics Marumalarchi Tamil Movie
stanzas:
Nandri solla unakku
varthai illai enakku
naan than mayanguren

kaalamulla varaikkum
kaaladiyil kidakka
naanthaan virumburen

nedunkaalam naan purinja
thavathaale nee kedaicha
pasum ponna pithalaiyaa
thavaraaga naan nenachen
neril vantha aandavane

Oorariya unnakku
maalaiyitta piriagum
yaemma sanjalam

unnudaiya manasum
ennudaiya manasum
ondraai sangamam

Sevvilani naan kudikka
seevi atha nee kodukka
sindhiyathu rathamalla
enthan uyir thaan

Kallirukkum thamaraiye
kaiyanaikkum vaanpiraiye
ullirukkum naadiyengum
unthan uyir thaan

Ini varum entha piraviyilum
unnai sera kaathiruppen

Vizhi moodum imai pola
vizhagamal vaazhnthiruppen

Unna pola deivamilla
unna pola kovil illa
dinam thorum archana than
ennakku vera velaiyilla

nandri solla unakku
varthai illai enakku
naan than maiyanguren

unnudaiya manasum
ennudaiya manasum
ondraai sangamam

Vanga kadal aazham enna
valluvargal kandathundu
anbu kadal aazham
yaarum kandathillaiye

Ennudaiya naayagane
oor vanangum nallavane
unnudaiya anbuk andha
vaanam ellaiye

Enakkena
vantha devathaiye
saripaadhi nee allavaa

Nadakkaiyil
undhan koodavarum
nizhal pole naan allava

Kannan konda raadhaiyena
raman konda seedhaiyena
madi serntldha pooraname
manathil veesum maaruthame

Nandri solla unakku
varthai illai enakku
naan than maiyanguren

Ennudaiya manasa
thanthu vitta piragum
Yaema kalangura

Nedunkaalam naan purinja
thavathaale nee kedaicha.
Thirukkoyil veedu endru
vilakketra neeyum vantha
Neril vantha aandhavane

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep gratitude and love, reflecting on emotional connections and the beauty of relationships.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Marumalarchi.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Hariharan.

What year was this song released?

Nandri Solla Unakku was released in 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nandri Solla Unakku, the protagonist expresses heartfelt gratitude and love, encapsulating the essence of emotional connections. The song's soothing melody and poignant lyrics evoke feelings of nostalgia and warmth. It beautifully conveys the struggles and joys of love, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. As part of Marumalarchi, it resonates with anyone who has experienced deep affection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nandri Solla Unakku is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and gratitude. With its soothing lyrics and heartfelt delivery, this song stands out as a timeless classic. Experience the emotional depth of Marumalarchi as it resonates with listeners across generations.
stanzaMeanings: I have no words to thank you, I am truly lost without you.
Until the time comes, I wish to rest at your feet.
In the long time I understood, if you took away the green gold, I thought of nothing else.
The God who came in front of me.
The one who is dear to you will always be a part of your life.
Your heart and my heart are united as one.
I drink from the cup of love, you give it to me, my life is not just a vessel.
The lotus that grows in the mud, the moon that shines in the sky, your life is everywhere.
In the next birth, I will wait to be with you.
I will live without closing my eyes, like a flower that blooms without wilting.
There is no God like you, no temple like you, every day my worship is only for you.
I have no words to thank you, I am truly lost without you.
Your heart and my heart are united as one.
The deep ocean of love, no one has seen it like the wise.
My leader, the one who is worshipped in the town, your love is the boundary of the sky.
Isn't the God who came to me perfect?
In your presence, I am like a shadow, not just anyone.
Like Krishna who held Radha, like Rama who held Sita, the fullness of love blows in my heart.
I have no words to thank you, I am truly lost without you.
After giving my heart, I am lost in confusion.
In the long time I understood, if you took away the green gold, you also came to the temple that was lit up.
The God who came in front of me.
